justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's temporal requests throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without offering proactive alternatives beyond a different time on the same day or a different day, and later, online options.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The conversation involved many turns where the agent repeatedly stated unavailability for the exact time requested without offering a range of alternative slots, leading to an inefficient back-and-forth.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was frustrating due to the agent's inability to proactively suggest available slots, leading to a repetitive and unproductive interaction where the user had to continuously propose new times.

overall_notes: The agent successfully understood all temporal requests but failed to proactively offer alternative available slots, making the conversation lengthy and frustrating for the user.
